  • gui package

gui.theme module

theme.py — A-LEMS global theme injection Drop this in gui/ and call inject_theme() at the top of every page. Handles dark / light mode toggle stored in st.session_state[“theme”].

gui.theme.inject_theme()[source]

Call once at the top of every page module. Reads st.session_state[“theme”] (“dark” | “light”). Injects global CSS overriding Streamlit’s default colours.

gui.theme.plotly_layout(dark: bool = None) → dict[source]

Returns a Plotly layout dict matching the current theme. Merge with fig.update_layout(**plotly_layout()).

gui.theme.theme_toggle_button()[source]

Renders a small ☀/☾ toggle button in sidebar or top bar. Call after inject_theme().
